name: LNbits Holesail Proxy
description: A Holesail proxy to connect remotely to your LNbits
compose:
name: slashnode-lnbits-holesail-proxy
services:
  web:
    image: orenz0/holesail-server-manager:v1.0.7
    container_name: lnbits-holesail-proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HSM_DATA_FILE: /data/hsm.json
      HSM_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      HSM_PORT: '3107'
      HSM_TITLE: LNbits Holesail Proxy
      HSM_TARGET_ADDRESS: lnbits_web_1
      HSM_TARGET_PORT: '3007'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3107:3107
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-lnbits-holesail-proxy_web_data
